name: Sweet and Sour Pork/ C/p
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Pork; boneless, cut into 2-inch strips
2 cans Pineapple chunks, 13.5 oz., drained - reserve syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pork pieces with paprika.
2. Heat shortening in a skillet. Sauté pork and discard fat.
3. Place meat in a removable liner (like a slow cooker lid).
4. Add onions and peppers to the liner.
5. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, dry milk, cornstarch, crushed chicken bou'ln cubes, pineapple chunks, vinegar, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
6. Mix until well combined. If needed, add water to achieve desired consistency.
7. Pour the entire mixture into the removable liner.
8. Place the liner in the base of the slow cooker.
9. Cover and cook on low for 8-9 hours or high for 4-5 hours, or according to your slow cooker's settings (auto for 6 hours).
10. During the last half hour of cooking, add pineapple slices.
